name: AI Evaluation Platform
description: A full-stack, production-ready AI Response Evaluation platform simulating RLHF and SFT workflows. Built with Flask, PostgreSQL, and the OpenAI API. Features Role-Based Access Control and side-by-side model comparison.
problem: Evaluating AI model responses manually is time-consuming and inconsistent across teams, making it difficult to track model performance improvements.
solution: Provide a centralized evaluation platform with RBAC, automated evaluation workflows, and comparative analysis tools for different AI models.
features: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for multi-user access
RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) simulation
challenges: Placeholder: Add technical challenges faced during development
